summary:
Day one done. Mexico edged South Africa 1-0 in what was a polite but functional opener — not pretty, but three points is three points. Whoever drew Mexico will be quietly smug. Whoever drew South Africa is already doing damage limitation calculations. ⚽

On the Wooden Spoon front, South Africa have kindly donated the first goal of the conceded column. It's early days but someone out there is already on the board — you know who you are.

The Avalanche has officially begun. 103 games to go and the gap between winner and spoon is already forming. Good luck to all. You'll need it.
